context.projectOverview: Sprint 3 authors the four money/crypto per-stack security skill files (solidity, anchor, igaming, dex-backend) as parseable signature blocks in the sprint-2 format, sourced from research-20260714.

completedSprints.title: parser + generic skill
completedSprints.summary: SecuritySignatureParser (pure/total, splits post-frontmatter body on ### headings, validates vulnClass against ALL_VULN_CLASSES, drops malformed) + skills/bober.security-generic/SKILL.md (14 blocks). IMPORTANT format note: the parser splits the WHOLE post-frontmatter body on ### — do NOT put a literal ### at line-start in prose/examples outside real signature blocks.
